source.name: Serebii
notes: This dataset includes only the top-level habitats table.
The separate Habitats (Event) section is intentionally excluded.

habitats.name: Tall Grass
habitats.description: Four tufts of tall grass bunched together in a plot. The perfect hiding place for small Pokémon

habitats.name: Tree-shaded tall grass
habitats.description: Shaded tall grass that stays cool, even in the midday sun. Pokémon might stop by to relax

habitats.name: Boulder-shaded Tall Grass
habitats.description: tall grass near a large boulder. Perfect for hide-and-seek

habitats.name: Hydrated tall grass
habitats.description: Tall grass along the water's edge. A habitat thriving with energy thanks to an abundance of water

habitats.name: Seaside Tall Grass
habitats.description: Tall grass that stands firm against the spray of saltwater. Good for escaping the seaside heat

habitats.name: Elevated tall grass
habitats.description: Such a high elevation means this area is quite cool. The wind blows all the way through the tall grass

habitats.name: Illuminated tall grass
habitats.description: A gently lit plot of tall grass. Pokémon are drawn to the inviting light

habitats.name: Pretty flower bed
habitats.description: A beautiful bed of wildflowers. A faint, sweet aroma wafts about it.

habitats.name: Tree-shaded flower bed
habitats.description: Beautifully blooming flowers beneath the shade ofa tree. Pokémon are attracted by the damp scent

habitats.name: Hydrated flower bed
habitats.description: A field of blooming waterside flowers. Pokémon may be attracted by the aroma and clear water.

habitats.name: Field of Flowers
habitats.description: A large field of flowers. Every petal emanates an ambrosial aroma

habitats.name: Elevated flower bed
habitats.description: A bed of flowers blooming at high elevation. The wind carries their sweet aroma all around

habitats.name: Grave with flowers
habitats.description: A habitat that exudes a gentle elegance. Pokémon could rest in joyful peace here

habitats.name: Flower garden
habitats.description: Plant some hedges near blooming flowers, and you'll have a decent garden in no time flat

habitats.name: Fresh Veggie Field
habitats.description: Vegetables growing in a nice, wild field. Seems likely to attact Pokémon who enjoy farming

habitats.name: Riding warm updrafts
habitats.description: The warm air from three campfires rises high into the sky!

habitats.name: Campsite
habitats.description: A campsite that celebrates elements of nature. Pokémon warm themselves in front of the campfire

habitats.name: Training waterfall
habitats.description: Pokémon who like to train may come here to sit under the waterfall and tone their bodies

habitats.name: Tantalizing dining set
habitats.description: A table set with dishes-and a chair for sitting. Hungry Pokémon might swing by here..

habitats.name: Picnic Set
habitats.description: A basked placed atop a table is all it takes to feel a little picnicky

habitats.name: Flowery table
habitats.description: A flower vase placed on top of a table. Pokémon might sit on the chair to look at the flower.

habitats.name: Bench with greenery
habitats.description: A bench near some hedges. Pokémon can rest here and bask in nature

habitats.name: Illuminated bench
habitats.description: A bench illuminated by gentle light. Pokémon entranced by the light might stop by

habitats.name: Exercise resting spot
habitats.description: After a fierce training session, Pokémon can rest their tired bodies on this bench

habitats.name: Urgent Care
habitats.description: When injured, seek first aid immediately! Pokémon skilled at healing may come to this habitat.

habitats.name: Gym first aid
habitats.description: A first-aid kit is on hand in case any Pokémon injure themselves exercising

habitats.name: Road Sign
habitats.description: A solitary sign by the middle of the road. Pokémon might head in the arrow's direction

habitats.name: Large luggage carrier
habitats.description: This long, wide cart can fit two large crates

habitats.name: Lumberjack's workplace
habitats.description: Haul logs with the cart and split them on the tree stump. The chair is there for taking breaks

habitats.name: Bed with a plush
habitats.description: A bed with a cute doll. Small Pokémon would probably feel safe sleeping here

habitats.name: Gently lit bed
habitats.description: A bed bathed in gentle light. Pokémon could probably sleep peacefully here

habitats.name: Grave offering
habitats.description: Candles and plated food placed silently before a gravestone. Pretty creepy…

habitats.name: Creepy grave offering
habitats.description: Light the candles by the gravestone to add some swaying blue flames for double the eeriness

habitats.name: Chansey Resting area
habitats.description: A peaceful, refreshing spot to take a break while Chansey watches over you

habitats.name: Irresistible scent and glow
habitats.description: Pokémon may be lured here by the glow of the mushroom and the scent of the plant-shaped pot

habitats.name: Floating in the shade
habitats.description: Have fun on the inflatable boat! If you get tired, you can take a break under the umbrella

habitats.name: Smooth tall grass
habitats.description: A strange smooth rock has drained the vitality from this tall grass

habitats.name: Factory Storage
habitats.description: The large machine doesn't seem to work, even if you plug in the cords and hit the buttons

habitats.name: Luxury chirp-chirp meal
habitats.description: Bird Pokémon can lounge in the birdhouse after enjoying a meal of various berries

habitats.name: Berry-feast Campsite
habitats.description: A cozy campfire underneat a clear sky. Prepare a big feast and have a good time!

habitats.name: Rain Dance site
habitats.description: Reminders of rain and a plate for offering food. The perfect spot to call for rainy weather

habitats.name: Sunny Day site
habitats.description: Reminders of sunshine and a plate for offering food. This is the perfect spot to call for fair weather

habitats.name: Professor's treasure trove
habitats.description: It may look like a bunch of junk, but every single piece here is worthy of study to a professor

habitats.name: Crazy log handicrafts
habitats.description: This space is packed with wooden furniture. It feels almost like you're in a mountain cabin

habitats.name: Very-berry space
habitats.description: A berry table, a berry bed…Everything's a berry! Just looking at them makes you hungry

habitats.name: Garden Terrace
habitats.description: Take a breather in a garden chair while looking at softly lit flowers

habitats.name: Tree-shaded snoozing Snorlax
habitats.description: Pokémon might come here mistakenly thinking that this is an actual sleeping Snorlax!

habitats.name: Good old-fashioned antiques
habitats.description: Enjoy the retro vibe of this collection of wonderful antique furniture!

habitats.name: Nothin' but Poke Balls
habitats.description: All Poké Balls…or so you thought! Living here is oddly comforting somehow

habitats.name: Yellow tall grass
habitats.description: A small plot made up of four tufts of yellow tall grass. Spots like this are often found in harbor towns

habitats.name: Tree-shaded Yellow tall grass
habitats.description: Yellow tall grass in the shade of a tree. The habitat has a melancholy feel to it.

habitats.name: Elevated yellow tall grass
habitats.description: Yellow tall grass growing at high elevation. It sways back and forth in the sea breeze

habitats.name: Hydrated yellow tall grass
habitats.description: Yellow tall grass by the water. A nice resting spot for Pokémon after they're done swimmign

habitats.name: Marshy tall grass
habitats.description: Tall grass growing in a marsh. Pokémon use this to wipe mud off themselves

habitats.name: Overgrowth vending machine
habitats.description: A lone vending machine amid yellow tall grass. Gotta stay hydrated-even out in nature

habitats.name: Breezy flower bed
habitats.description: A bed of refreshing seashore flowers. Pokémon are drawn in by its gentle scent

habitats.name: Tropical vibes
habitats.description: Seashore flowers rest beneath the leaves of a palm tree. Their tropical aroma drifts around the area

habitats.name: Windy Flower Bed
habitats.description: A breeze whooshes over this cool flower bed. As the windmill turns, a floral aroma spreads far and wide.

habitats.name: Shaded beach
habitats.description: The leaves of a palm tree serve as a parasol to Pokémon resting in the beach chair.

habitats.name: Tropical seaside
habitats.description: Kick back by a palm tree and feel the ocean breeze for the full tropical experience

habitats.name: Resting spot
habitats.description: Empty cardboard boxes and a fluffy straw bed. Opinions are divided on which provides better sleep.

habitats.name: Perpetual mess
habitats.description: Scattered toys and cardboard. Just when you think you're done tidying up, the mess somehow returns.

habitats.name: Trash collection site
habitats.description: A place to dump everyone's garbage. You might even spot some trash-hunting Pokémon here!

habitats.name: Trash can central
habitats.description: Trash cans put in place to prevent littering. You can sometimes find Pokémon inside them

habitats.name: Trash disposal site
habitats.description: Some trash left by a power pole. Its surroundings smell a little stinky

habitats.name: Park bench
habitats.description: After eating a snack, put your trash in the trash can. …Think Pokémon can remember to do that?

habitats.name: Tantalizing restaurant
habitats.description: Dishes on a table. There's even a menu, so it's just like being in a restaurant.

habitats.name: Tableside delivery cart
habitats.description: Wheel out the dishes nice and slow, because once they reach the table, it's chow time

habitats.name: Chirp-chirp meal
habitats.description: Bird Pokémon are sure to come and enjoy feasting on the plated food.

habitats.name: Café space
habitats.description: Enjoy teatime while admiring the potted tree. Pokémon can feel refreshed here

habitats.name: Beach Set
habitats.description: Lounge under this parasol, and bask in the tropical vibes. Pokémon might enjoy relaxing here.

habitats.name: Light-up stage
habitats.description: A stage bathed in dazzling light. It seems likely to attract attention-seeking Pokémon

habitats.name: Surprise in store
habitats.description: A pop-art box surrounded by balloons. What's in the box? Open it and find out!

habitats.name: Night festival venue
habitats.description: The colorful neon lights of this festival entrance glow brilliantly, especially at night

habitats.name: Changing area
habitats.description: Give your look a once-over in the mirror after you change clothes. A place to become your ideal self!

habitats.name: Private makeup stand
habitats.description: The partition helps keep prying eyes away before you're ready for the public

habitats.name: Knitting station
habitats.description: Pokémon will be fascinated by the fluffy yarn and the adorable crafts that can be made from it

habitats.name: Hot-spring shower
habitats.description: You can't jump in the hot spring without rinsing off at a shower first! Pokémon might enjoy soaking here

habitats.name: Resort meal prep
habitats.description: Sitting by a campfire underneat a palm tree…Let's kick back and cook some food

habitats.name: All packed up
habitats.description: Let's pack some cardboard boxes full of stuff and stack them on top of a cart!

habitats.name: Full recovery
habitats.description: Nothing like a good nap when you're feeling sick. A caring Pokémon might even come to check in!

habitats.name: Alarm clock sleep zone
habitats.description: Setting the bedside alarm clock makes waking up in the morning a breeze

habitats.name: Vending machine break area
habitats.description: A long bench beside a vending machine. Pokémon might swing by to take a breather.

habitats.name: Vending machine set
habitats.description: A trash can beside a vending machine. Doesn't look like there are any empty cans inside

habitats.name: Mini Game Corner
habitats.description: When you're done playing arcade games, you can hit up the punching game to get your body moving!

habitats.name: Waterwheel Spot
habitats.description: This amazing facility generaes electriciy through the power of a waterfall

habitats.name: Furnace Spot
habitats.description: When you fuel this amazing contraption, it generates electricity with the power of fire

habitats.name: Dock
habitats.description: A cozy little dock on the beach. Swimming Pokémon might stop by now and then.

habitats.name: Spooky study
habitats.description: Light thre candle to read by firelight! This place feels spooky when night falls

habitats.name: Playing pirate
habitats.description: Stand in front of the wheel or ight by the cannons, and you'll feel like you're sailing the open seas!

habitats.name: Working the register
habitats.description: Put a register on a table, power it on, and boom! You'll be ready for business in no time

habitats.name: Tiny Atelier
habitats.description: Take a seat in front of the canvas and let your imagination run wild. Inspiration is waiting to strike!

habitats.name: Gourmet's altar
habitats.description: Putting an offering of food on this platter would surely delight Pokémon who live to eat

habitats.name: Pikachu space
habitats.description: The sofa and doll are both Pikachu! Some Pokémon might mistake them for the real Pikachu and stop by

habitats.name: Cuteness overload
habitats.description: Being surrounded by all this cute furniture will make you feel perfectly pampered

habitats.name: Welcoming resort
habitats.description: Relax on the sofa or lie down on the hammock, and you'll feel like you're in the lap of luxury.

habitats.name: Plain life
habitats.description: A simple yet calming space. Pokémon are sure to be comfortable here.

habitats.name: Red tall grass
habitats.description: A small plot made up of four tufts of red tall grass. Spots like this are often found in valleys

habitats.name: Tree-shaded red tall grass
habitats.description: Pokmon are drawn to this place, invited by the damp aroma of the red tall grass.

habitats.name: Pointy tree-shaded rocky tall grass
habitats.description: Lean against the rock in the tall grass, and take a break while admiring the large pointy tree.

habitats.name: Hydrated red tall grass
habitats.description: While red tall grass often grows in valleys, it also thrives just fine on the waterside

habitats.name: Elevated red tall grass
habitats.description: Red tall grass flourishes even in high-altitude areas like mountaintops

habitats.name: Grassy training field
habitats.description: The bags of dirt can be used as dumbbells. Perfect for Pokémon who love to train

habitats.name: Graceful flower bed
habitats.description: Numerous mountain flowers bloom to form an elegant and beautiful flower bed.

habitats.name: Tree-shaded graceful flower bed
habitats.description: The elegant aroma of these mountain flowers wafts all throughout the area

habitats.name: Hydrated graceful flower bed
habitats.description: These elegant mountain flowers bloom beautifully, even right beside thew ater.

habitats.name: Flower garden stump stage
habitats.description: A stage set up in a field of flowers. Hop on the stump to bathe in the spotlight and feel just like a star

habitats.name: Toil in the soil
habitats.description: A thriving vegetable field. Replacing the soil every so often provides fresh nutrients

habitats.name: Uplifting duckweed
habitats.description: You can walk on top of the duckweed or jump into the water and float next to them

habitats.name: Mossy rest spot
habitats.description: All that nice, damp moss makes this a great location for Pokémon who love humid places

habitats.name: Mossy boulder
habitats.description: A quiet, peaceful atmosphere. It looks like Pokémon could really unwind here

habitats.name: Mossy hot spring
habitats.description: A hot spring surrounded by green moss. Soak up the calming atmosphere as you soak in warm water.

habitats.name: Open-air bath
habitats.description: Pokémon can also soak in a nice hot spring while enjoying beautiful scenery

habitats.name: Harmonious hot spring
habitats.description: Some Pokémon enjoy moving between the hot spring and the cold bath to feel light and refreshed

habitats.name: Piping-hot lava
habitats.description: Nothin' but piping-hot lava here! Fire-type Pokémon simply can't resist visiting

habitats.name: Digging and burning
habitats.description: A big furnace with equipment next to it. Someone might come to light the flame

habitats.name: Clink-clang iron construction
habitats.description: It looks like construction is underway. Some strong Pokémon might show up to help

habitats.name: Creepy white rocks
habitats.description: The thick moss near the stalagmites and the long glowing lantern create a slightly creepy vibe.

habitats.name: Container snacking
habitats.description: Looks like someone snuck a snack by some storage containers. Pokémon might like a spot like this

habitats.name: Dinner table surprise
habitats.description: There's no better thrill than lifting the lid off a dish to reveal today's meal

habitats.name: Best bread bakery
habitats.description: Prepare some side dishes while you wait for bread to finish baking.

habitats.name: Mini kitchen
habitats.description: Wash your dishes and ingredients, then cook away on the stove. What's on the menu for today?

habitats.name: House party
habitats.description: Help yourself to food and drinks, and have a total blast with all your friends

habitats.name: Lazy-photo album scrolling
habitats.description: Kick back with a drink in your hand and use the tablet to reminisce over some photos

habitats.name: Chirping recital
habitats.description: Bird Pokémon may swoop in and use the microphone to show off their singing skills

habitats.name: Recital stage
habitats.description: This stage was made for just one thing-now get up there and SING!

habitats.name: Box to the rhythm
habitats.description: Pokémon can feel the rhythm here and get pumped for a training session

habitats.name: Music and magazines
habitats.description: Reading feels even more relaxing when you throw on some background music

habitats.name: Mini museum
habitats.description: Anything can look like a masterpiece if you pop it on an exhibition stand!

habitats.name: Refreshing locker room
habitats.description: Even a simple locker room can have a refreshing atmosphere with the addition of a houseplant or two.

habitats.name: Bronze landmark
habitats.description: A photoworthy bronze statue of three Pokémon. Their combined cuteness is sure to attract a crowd!

habitats.name: Railroad crossing
habitats.description: Absolutely no crossing while the bar is lowered! But…will Pokémon actually sotp and wait?

habitats.name: Chef's kitchen
habitats.description: With a stove, a sink, and some key cooking equipment, this place is a chef's dream

habitats.name: Absolute luxury
habitats.description: Every single piece of this furniture set is top-notch, creating the ultimate air of luxury

habitats.name: Heavy iron
habitats.description: A monochromatic space with weighty furniture. Light the lantern to add another layer of calm

habitats.name: Modern living
habitats.description: Stylishly simple. The modern design gives off a sense of classiness

habitats.name: Pink tall grass
habitats.description: A small plot made up of four tufts of pink tall grass. Spots like this are often found in the skylands

habitats.name: Tree-shaded pink tall grass
habitats.description: Growing in the shade of a tree, this pink grass is just the tiniest bit damp

habitats.name: Hydrated pink tall grass
habitats.description: The pink of the tall grass contrasts beautifully with the blue hues of the water.

habitats.name: Elevated pink tall grass
habitats.description: Tall pink grass from way above the clouds. Even strong winds can't stop it from growing

habitats.name: Concrete pipe secret base
habitats.description: A concrete pipe that hasn't been used in al ong time. The hollow interior is perfect for a secret base.

habitats.name: Fluffy flower bed
habitats.description: A cute field full of lots of puffy skyland flowers

habitats.name: Tree-shaded fluffy flower bed
habitats.description: Poofy skyland flowers bloom cutely-even in the cool shade of a tree

habitats.name: Hydrated fluffy flower bed
habitats.description: Water can't diminish the gentle aroma wafting from these skyland flowers.

habitats.name: Waterside dinghy
habitats.description: Board the canoe, or just enjoy some tranquil time relaxing by the waterside

habitats.name: Illuminated waterfall
habitats.description: Use the torches to light a path to the waterfall. Pokémon might stop by to check it out

habitats.name: Birdsong garden
habitats.description: A comfy birdhouse with a neatly trimmed hedge. You can almost hear chirping

habitats.name: Simple bathroom
habitats.description: An ordinary bathroom. Pokémon might stop by to wash themselves.

habitats.name: Cycling rest stop
habitats.description: Stop your bicycle here for a quick break. Pokémon sometimes hide behind the vending machine.

habitats.name: Fireplace nap spot
habitats.description: If you're feeling chilly, you can sit by this fireplace and it will gently warm you.

habitats.name: Surging psychic power
habitats.description: Sit in front of the crystal ball and focus to gain mastery over your psychic powers…maybe.

habitats.name: Fortune-teller's table
habitats.description: Maybe using psychic power to peer into the crystal ball will give you a glimpse of the future…

habitats.name: Trash site TV
habitats.description: A lone TV left out with the garbage. It looks like it can still be turned on.

habitats.name: Oversized dumping ground
habitats.description: A dumping ground where you can even throw away large items. Unwanted appliances can go here!

habitats.name: Interrogation desk
habitats.description: You and Arcanine, interrogating perps side by side… The tension in the air is palpable

habitats.name: Sewer hole inspection
habitats.description: Looks like repairs are being carried out here. Only workers are allowed in-no exceptions!

habitats.name: Spotless Washing station
habitats.description: Washing your face and drying it off with a towel feels refreshing. Check out how you look in the mirror!

habitats.name: Home theater
habitats.description: Some big speakers and a TV make this space feel just likea movie theater

habitats.name: Study Area
habitats.description: Just sitting at this desk with a pencil in hand is enough to make you feel a little smarter

habitats.name: Rhythmic Living room
habitats.description: A large TV with a rhythm game hooked up to it. Step on the mats in time with the beat!

habitats.name: Squeaky clean
habitats.description: Put lots of cleaner on the Mareep spone and make that bathroom shine

habitats.name: Moisturizing makeup stand
habitats.description: Making sure your skin is moisturized will ensure your makeup comes out even more perfectly than usual!

habitats.name: Mini library
habitats.description: Light the lamp to peruse the books at your leisure, even in the dark ofnight

habitats.name: Game Corner battle zone
habitats.description: Players site side by side here to game against each other!P okémon might come here to play.

habitats.name: Playland
habitats.description: To play on the big slide or with the toys… Now that's a hard choice

habitats.name: Work desk
habitats.description: Sit on the office chair and type away at the computer. If you feel tired, grab a beverage and take a break!

habitats.name: Office storeroom
habitats.description: Packed with old documents and unused equipment. Lost Pokémon sometimes wander inside.

habitats.name: Experiment Space
habitats.description: A space for conducting experiments. Someone may have left their research notes behind.

habitats.name: Professor's apprentice program
habitats.description: Keep up with your research, and someday you might become as wide and learned as Professor Tangrowth!

habitats.name: Researcher's desk
habitats.description: Today's research topic is Pokémon's role in science! Some data has been entered into the computer

habitats.name: Public reading material
habitats.description: Anyone can freely pick up and enjoy the newspapers and magazines found here

habitats.name: Heart-pounding surprise box
habitats.description: The rhythm of the big drum, the spotlights on the boo-in-the-box… The suspense is palpable!

habitats.name: Prank button
habitats.description: A conspicuous button next to a boo-in-the-box. To press, or not to press, that is the questino.

habitats.name: Picturesque photo cutout board
habitats.description: Say cheese! Stick your face in the cutoutboard and snap a photo to commemorate your hoke.

habitats.name: Tire Park
habitats.description: For some reason, the tires are more enticing than the big slide… Yeah! Let's play with all the different tires!

habitats.name: Nature's market
habitats.description: Just power up the cash register, and you'll be able to trade with your friends-even out in nature!

habitats.name: Construction-site generator
habitats.description: Construction needs a lot of electricity! You can use any leftover lumber as fuel

habitats.name: Dojo training
habitats.description: Once you emply the spirit of the warrior, you will be able to move even the heaviest of boulders

habitats.name: Evil organization HQ
habitats.description: A comfy couch in front of an organization's emblem. Sitting here makes you feel like a boss.

habitats.name: Nine flames
habitats.description: The gentle sway of these nine blazing flames gives their surroundings a subtly mystical ambeience

habitats.name: Plush central
habitats.description: Some Pokémon might mistake all these dolls for the real things

habitats.name: Gamer's paradise
habitats.description: A space perfectly tailored for gaming. Take a seat and immerse yourself in the world of games!

habitats.name: Top pop
habitats.description: The colorful pop-art furniture gives off a cheerful atmosphere that'll lift your spirits in no time!

habitats.name: Fishing pond
habitats.description: Cast a line and wait patiently. Perhaps a Water-type Pokémon will appear!

habitats.name: Ocean fishing spot
habitats.description: Ocean fishing can be fun! You may meet different species of Pokémon than you would in fresh water.

habitats.name: Marsh fishing spot
habitats.description: Pokémon live in marshlands too! Try casting your lin into some swampy water sometime

habitats.name: Hot-spring Fishing Spot
habitats.description: Pokémon enjoying a nice dip in the hot spring might be lure in with some bait.

habitats.name: Magma fishing spot
habitats.description: Catch Pokémon by fishing in magma. Wait, how do you do that without the line melting?!

habitats.name: Amped rock stage
habitats.description: The wail of the guitar marks the start of this amped-up performance

habitats.name: Low-key rock stage
habitats.description: The hum of the bass guitar marks the start of al ow-key musical performance

habitats.name: Malicious knight's shrine
habitats.description: A slightly eerie space where a mysterious ritual appears to be underway...

habitats.name: Auspicious knight's shrine
habitats.description: A slightly mystical space where a mysterious ritual appears to be underway...

habitats.name: Wing Fossil Display
habitats.description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once ruler of the skies

habitats.name: Skull Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This fossilized skull is as hard as iron

habitats.name: Headbutt Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's skull was harder than steel

habitats.name: Armor Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a hard neck frill that looks like a shield.

habitats.name: Shield Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's large neck frill was as sturdy as a fortress wall.

habitats.name: Jaw Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a piece of a jawbone that could crush anything,

habitats.name: Despot fossil display
habitats.description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once the ruler of the land.

habitats.name: Sail Fossil display
habitats.description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This piece of neck sail was once frozen in ice.

habitats.name: Tundra fossil display
habitats.description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. The specimen's beautiful neck sail resembles an aurora.

habitats.name: Boundless blue beverage
habitats.description: A clear-blue ice-cream float. It's like looking deep into the ocean

habitats.name: Electrifying potatoes
habitats.description: A basket of crispy potato stars. They're shockingly delicious!

habitats.name: Burning-hot spice
habitats.description: Putting hot sauce on this round pizza will make it so spicy that you'll feel like you're breathing fire.

habitats.name: Elegant daytime treats
habitats.description: Teatime is always midday. Take a seat, have a snack, and bask in the elegance of it all.

habitats.name: Dark-chocolate cookies
habitats.description: Cookies made from dark chocolate. They have a subtle, comforting taste without being overly sweet

habitats.name: Leafy greens sandwich
habitats.description: A sandwich packed with greens and veggies would really hit the spot right now

habitats.name: Chilly shaved ice
habitats.description: Shaved ice served with frozen toppings. Eating this could make you feel teeth-chatteringly chilly

habitats.name: Lovely ribbon cake
habitats.description: The large ribbon and heart decorations make this cake look quite lovely. It tastes incredibly sweet.
